channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: A Detailed Guide to European River Cruise Costs in 2026
item.description: In 2026, Australians considering a European river cruise should expect to pay between $4,000 and $10,000+ AUD per person for an 8-day journey, depending on the cabin type and cruise line. Entry-level ...

item.title: TMPD deputy commissioner denies authorising irregular allocations to Gubis85 Solutions at Madlanga Commission
item.description: Tshwane Metro Police Department (TMPD) deputy commissioner Sean Bolhuis appeared before the Madlanga Commission of Inquiry on Wednesday, where he addressed allegations of tender irregularities involvi...

item.title: President Samia Swears in Newly Appointed Ministers at Chamwino State House
item.description: Today, on April 8, 2026, President Samia Suluhu Hassan officially swore in several government leaders she recently appointed in a ceremony at Chamwino State House in Dodoma. Among those taking the oat...

item.title: Defence emphasises doubts over evidence in Irma Palasics murder trial
item.description: In the ACT Supreme Court, the trial of Joseph Vekony and Steve Fabriczy, both 70, concluded after nearly two months of evidence regarding the 1999 murder of 72-year-old Irma Palasics. The defence, led...

item.title: ADC and PDP Leaders Hold Closed-Door Meeting in Abuja Following Anti-INEC Protest
item.description: Leaders of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) don meet with some key people from the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) under Kabiru Tanimu Turaki for a private meeting for Abuja. Big names like Senato...

item.title: India Strengthens Defence Ties with Kenya Through Equipment Handover and Joint Exercises
item.description: Things are looking good between Kenya and India, my friend! India has just handed over some serious gear to the Kenya Defence Forces (KDF). We’re talking about 100 INSAS rifles, a whooping 50,000 roun...

item.title: US and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire Amidst Conflict, Key Headlines from April 8
item.description: The Philippines' daily news roundup for April 8, 2026, highlights a significant development in the ongoing US-Iran conflict: a tentative two-week ceasefire agreement. US President Donald Trump has rep...

item.title: Deloitte report warns of global energy instability and ongoing strain on Western Canada's gas market
item.description: A recent Deloitte report sheds light on the ongoing volatility in global energy markets, with significant implications for gas prices in Western Canada. The report underscores the challenges facing th...

item.title: Iran Suspends Oil Ship Transit in Strait of Hormuz Amid Tensions Over Ceasefire Deal
item.description: Iran has suspended the passage of oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz following renewed hostilities and Israel's attacks on Lebanon. Initially, two tankers were allowed through at the start of a ...

item.title: Parents face charges after toddler injured in wolf enclosure at Pennsylvania zoo
item.description: Authorities in Derry Township, Pennsylvania, have charged the parents of a 17-month-old toddler with child endangerment following an incident at ZooAmerica North American Wildlife Park in Hersheypark....

item.title: Thirumavalavan criticises AIADMK for aligning with BJP, urges support for DMK in Tamil Nadu polls
item.description: Speaking at an election rally in Dindigul, Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK) president Thol. Thirumavalavan declared that the people of Tamil Nadu would show that casteist and communal forces have ...

item.title: Ross Solly Claims Top Spot on Canberra Breakfast Radio
item.description: Ross Solly has reclaimed his position as Canberra's leading breakfast radio host on ABC Radio Canberra, narrowly overtaking MIX 106.3's Kristen and Nige. Returning to the breakfast slot in early 2025 ...

item.title: Quebec teen soccer talent blocked from Real Madrid training camp due to asylum status
item.description: Fourteen-year-old Bernivens Bernadotte, a talented soccer player living in Longueuil, Quebec, has been offered an extraordinary opportunity to train for a week at Real Madrid CF's official training ce...

item.title: University of Jos Lecturers Begin Indefinite Strike Over Unpaid Salaries and Allowances
item.description: The Academic Staff Union of Universities (ASUU), University of Jos chapter, don announce say dem go begin indefinite strike from Wednesday, 8 April 2026. The wahala start as lecturers no receive their...

item.title: 21-Year-Old Man Killed in Primrose Hill Stabbing Identified as Finbar Sullivan
item.description: Finbar Sullivan, a 21-year-old man, has been named as the victim of a fatal stabbing in Primrose Hill, North London. Police were called to the scene at around 9:00 pm on the evening of the incident. D...

item.title: Police register case after hoax bomb threat email to Bengaluru airport
item.description: A bomb threat email sent to Bengaluru’s Kempegowda International Airport turned out to be a hoax, according to reports. The message prompted security concern and a verification exercise, but officials...

item.title: Salman Safdar meets Imran Khan in Adiala Jail as per IHC’s order
item.description: On April 8, 2026, Barrister Salman Safdar, a lawyer representing PTI's founder Imran Khan in the Al Qadir case, visited the former prime minister at Adiala jail. The meeting followed a directive from ...

item.title: Long Island architect pleads guilty to murdering eight women in Gilgo Beach case
item.description: Rex Heuermann, a 62-year-old architect from Long Island, has pleaded guilty to the murders of seven women and admitted to killing an eighth in the notorious Gilgo Beach serial killings. The crimes, wh...

item.title: Pawan Kalyan calls on youth to embrace national ideology and focus on energy science at AU centenary fest
item.description: At the valedictory ceremony of the 'Mega Cultural Fest-2026', held as part of Andhra University’s centenary celebrations, Andhra Pradesh's Deputy Chief Minister K. Pawan Kalyan spoke about the importa...

item.title: California Man Pleads Guilty in U.S. to Conspiracy Related to Jalisco New Generation Cartel
item.description: Erick Valencia Salazar, a California resident, has pleaded guilty in the United States to a federal narcotics conspiracy charge. He co-founded the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG) alongside the no...
